title: AI Lead Engineer
description:
The purpose of this role is to provide technical guidance
and suggest improvements in development processes. Develop
required software features, achieving timely delivery in
compliance with the performance and quality standards of the
company.

Job Description:

Key responsibilities: Participates in the entire software
development cycle - requirements’ analysis, design and
development, unit testing and documentation Responsible for
long-term code reusability and stability Proactively
identifies security, usability etc. issues and formulates
strategies to resolve them Works independently, without
guidance, with broader overview on the project Takes
ownership for the delivery of complex application features
and resolves key technical issues related to the assigned
project Complies with estimation process and is responsible
for accurate personal estimates Develops required software
features, achieving timely and quality delivery Delivers
trainings and participates in knowledge sharing Mentors new
software engineers in the team Integrates new technologies
Understands and follows the release processes in the company

Location:

DGS India - Mumbai - Thane Ashar IT Park

Brand:

Merkle

Time Type:

Full time

Contract Type:

Permanent
responsibilities: Participates in the entire software development cycle including requirements analysis, design, development, unit testing and documentation
Ensures long-term code reusability and stability of software solutions
Proactively identifies security and usability issues and formulates strategies to resolve them
Takes ownership for delivery of complex application features and resolves key technical issues
Mentors new software engineers and participates in knowledge sharing and training delivery
Integrates new technologies and follows company release processes
ai_classification_reasoning:
The job title includes "AI Lead Engineer" but the
description focuses entirely on general software engineering
practices: development lifecycle, code reusability,
security, testing, and mentoring. There is no mention of
building, training, fine-tuning, or deploying AI/ML models,
suggesting this is a general SWE role at an AI-related
company (dentsu/Merkle) rather than hands-on AI development.
